name: Saute Chicken Livers with Onions & Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. If using canned mushrooms, squeeze all liquid from the mushrooms first.
If using fresh, do not rinse; simply wipe clean with a paper towel.
2. In a bowl or plastic bag, mix together pancake flour, garlic powder, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Coat the chicken livers thoroughly in the pancake mixture. Place them on a paper plate to set aside.
4. Heat 3 tablespoons of olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Once hot, add the onions and cook until they are just clear, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Remove the onions from the pan and set them aside.
6. In the same pan, heat a little more olive oil if needed to prevent the livers from cooling down too quickly.
7. Add the chicken livers in batches (do not crowd the pan) and cook until the edges are browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Remove the onions and add the mushrooms to the pan. Lower the heat slightly if necessary.
9. Cook the livers for another 2 or 3 minutes on a medium heat until they are cooked through and tender.
10. Serve immediately with rice pilaf or enjoy as an appetizer on its own.
